faq.title: Pricing questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know before choosing a package.

items.question: What's the difference between the two packages?
items.answer: The Professional WordPress Website is built on WordPress — a fast, affordable, and reliable solution for most businesses. The Premium Custom Coded Website is fully custom-built from scratch, offering a unique design, stronger performance, and a more advanced experience.

items.question: Which package is right for my business?
items.answer: If you need a professional website quickly at a good price, the WordPress package is a great fit. If you want a unique, high-end, ultra-fast website that truly stands out, the Premium Custom Coded package is the better choice. Not sure? Just contact us and we'll help you decide.

items.question: Is hosting included in both packages?
items.answer: Yes. Both packages include hosting, a domain name for one full year, and a professional email address.

items.question: Can I upgrade from WordPress to a custom website later?
items.answer: Yes. Many clients start with the WordPress package and upgrade to a Premium Custom Coded Website once their business grows.

items.question: Do I need to pay everything upfront?
items.answer: We'll agree on clear payment terms together before starting, usually a deposit to begin and the balance upon delivery.

items.question: What if I'm still not sure which to choose?
items.answer: No problem — fill out the contact form and select "I'm not sure, help me choose." We'll ask a few questions and recommend the best option for your goals.

Capabilities.title: More than just a website
Capabilities.subtitle: Practical capabilities that help you run your business, not just showcase it.

delivery.title: Delivery Integration
delivery.description: For online stores, the website can be connected with delivery company systems when available, helping manage orders and shipping more efficiently.

notifications.title: Order & Form Notifications
notifications.description: Get notified by email for new orders, form submissions, booking requests, and other important customer actions.

payments.title: Flexible Payment Methods
payments.description: Online stores can support cash on delivery, online card payment, manual payment methods, or a payment gateway when available.

management.title: Easy Product & Order Management
management.description: Manage products, orders, customers, and stock from a simple, easy-to-use management space.

training.title: Training After Delivery
training.description: Tutorial videos are provided after delivery so you know exactly how to manage your website.
